title_001: AI New Human Test — What’s Your AI-Era Survival Character?
meta_001: AI New Human Test — Which new human am I?
meta_002: In an age where AI swallows jobs, only 8 types survive. Find your AI-era survival character in 24 questions.
html_001: 🧪 Dopamine Lab · Surviving the AI Era
html_004: In an age where AI is swallowing jobs,
html_005: the people who still survive come in just

html_026: The more honestly you answer — watching only the gauge — the truer your result.
html_027: The pillars of all 8 new humans grow — who’s who is revealed at the end!
html_029: You’re this kind of new human
html_030: 🧬 The map of 8 new humans inside me
html_031: The tallest peak is your lead character; the second is your trusty sidekick.
html_033: was born from one idea: “AI won’t replace people — people who use AI well will replace those who don’t.” It doesn’t measure ability so much as reflect
html_038: 🧪 Dopamine Lab — more tests this way →
js_001: When a new AI tool drops, I try it first and start figuring out how to plug it into my work
js_002: Anything repetitive, I hunt for a way to automate it or hand it off
js_003: I enjoy tweaking my prompts over and over, taming the AI until it gives me what I want
js_004: I can’t stand output that looks like everyone else’s — it has to carry my taste and my touch
js_005: I’m drawn more to something rough and human than to something slick the AI made
js_006: I want people to say “only that person could have made this”
js_007: When I meet a great person or find good info, I connect them straight to whoever might need it
js_008: Gathering people and getting something started excites me more than working solo
js_009: In the end, I believe it’s people who remain — in work and in life
js_010: I linger longer on “what should we even be solving?” than on the answer
js_011: In meetings, I often name the ‘real problem’ everyone else missed
js_012: I habitually ask back, “Why?” and “What actually matters here?”
js_013: When everyone’s rushing, I stop once to ask whether it’s even the right direction
js_014: The values and principles I want to keep come before speed or trends
js_015: No matter how the tech changes, I have my own standards that don’t waver
js_016: I get a thrill from being first to try something nobody’s doing yet
js_017: I’d rather just go for it and learn by doing, even if I fail
js_018: The moment I think “this could work,” I dive in faster than anyone
js_019: I love weaving scattered bits of info into “so this is where it’s all heading”
js_020: I connect fields that seem unrelated and spark new ideas from them
js_021: I tend to see the big picture and the context before the details
js_022: I always assume what I’m good at today could be useless in a few years
js_023: Learning something new isn’t stress to me — it’s fun
js_024: Even if my environment or job changes, I’m confident I can relearn and adapt
js_026: You bend AI to your will like a tool. In your hands, one AI does the work of ten people.
js_027: You don’t fear new tools — you plug them straight into your work. Repetition gets automated away, and you spend the freed-up time on what really matters.
js_028: You treat AI as an amplifier, not a threat. Master the tools deeply, but grow the judgment and taste no tool can replace, and you’re unstoppable.
js_029: Skilled with tools but empty on the ‘what’ and ‘why,’ you just do other people’s work faster. Pair with a Questioner who gives you direction.
js_031: The human touch AI can’t fake. What only you can make is your weapon.
js_032: You’re drawn to originals steeped in taste and craft, not slick mass production. You want to hear “only that person could’ve made this.”
js_033: In an age of sameness, rarity is value. Let AI scale the quantity, but the final 0.1% of taste — that’s the human signature, and it’s your brand.
js_034: If perfectionism keeps you from ever shipping, no one will know. Borrow the reach of a Connector.
js_036: The hub linking person to person, person to AI. Your relationships are your capital.
js_037: Meet a great person or a good lead, and you connect them to whoever needs it. You come alive when you gather people and set the stage.
js_038: When information is free, what’s left is who you know and who trusts you. Use AI as a megaphone to widen your reach, but build trust human to human.
js_039: Flow too wide and too shallow and nothing sticks. Team up with one Artisan who digs deep, and your network becomes a masterpiece.
js_041: When answers are free, a good question is power. You set the direction.
js_042: You dwell on “what should we even solve?” longer than on the answer. Sometimes you name the real problem everyone else missed.
js_043: AI is just an answer machine — deciding what to ask is a human’s job. Sharpen how you define problems, and no matter what tool arrives, you’re in the driver’s seat.
js_044: Questions with no execution leave you a daydreamer. Pair with a Tamer’s follow-through and your questions turn into results.
js_046: When everything shakes, you hold a standard. In an age of speed, you keep the direction.
js_047: When everyone’s rushing, you stop once to ask “is this right?” Values you want to keep come before trends.
js_048: The faster tech moves, the more precious the ethics and center of “why” and “how far.” An unshakable standard becomes trust — and trust can’t be replaced.
js_049: Too much caution and you miss the chance. Keep a Pioneer’s drive beside you and split the gas pedal and the brake between you.
js_051: While others hesitate, you jump on first. You’re the one who opens new ground.
js_052: You feel the thrill of trying what no one has. Even if it flops, you just go for it and learn.
js_053: The faster things change, the more the first-mover wins. Fast experiments and fast learning are your weapon — just record what you learn so it becomes an asset.
js_054: All launch and no landing or direction, and you burn out. With an Anchor beside you, the sprint becomes a voyage.
js_056: You read the current inside the flood of information. The one who connects the dots into a picture.
js_057: You weave scattered info into “so this is the trend,” linking fields that seem unrelated.
js_058: AI hands you the pieces but never the context. Cross-field fusion and the big picture are your irreplaceable turf.
js_059: Draw only the big picture and you may drop execution and detail. Team up with a Lifelong Learner to keep your insight fresh.
js_061: Even if your job disappears, you learn again. Adaptability is your last insurance policy.
js_062: You always assume what you’re good at now could soon go stale. Learning itself is the fun part.
js_063: It’s not what you know but how fast you can relearn that decides survival. Sharpen the way you learn, and you’ll pass through any change.
js_064: Learn without using it and you stay a knowledge collector. Pair with a Synthesizer to slot what you learn into the big picture.
js_070: ⚠️ Just watch out for this
js_072: . This side of you is growing right alongside the rest.
js_073: 💞 Unstoppable together — your best-partner new human

_app.title: AI New Human Test
_app.desc: AI is swallowing jobs — 8 types survive. Which is your survival character?
